result.summary: Ory on boxyhq.com exposes public product/docs pages plus a developer portal; no machine-readable API/MCP/CLI specs were confirmed, and the only clearly acquired credential is an Ory Console account for managed Ory Network access.

ory_console_account.label: Ory Console account
ory_console_account.setup: Create an account at [Ory Console registration](https://console.ory.com/registration). This is the starting point for Ory Network projects and managed services.

surfaces.name: Ory Polis / Directory Sync product docs
